chain: phi_0 -> C3 -> K4 -> cluster -> 600-cell -> 2I -> E8-roots -> E8-lattice -> foam
minimal_unit: K4 = the qubit SIC: 4 nodes = 4 states = 1 qubit (4 Bloch vectors of one Bloch sphere; pairwise fidelity 1/3, sum n = 0)
seed: C3 = 3 of the 4 SIC states (the minimal phase-carrying loop; 2-cycles have gamma = 0)
tetrahedral_growth_origin: the d^2=4 cap (Gerzon bound) blocks enlarging the single-qubit SIC, so it REPLICATES -> tetrahedral aggregation

two_routes_to_E8.constructive: tetrahedral growth -> 5-tet cluster (deficit) -> 600-cell on S3 -> 2I -> McKay -> E8 root system
two_routes_to_E8.static_self_duality: maximal mutual determination = relational completeness = self-duality (Lambda=Lambda*) -> even unimodular -> dimension 8 -> E8 (unique)

key_invariants.Omega_prim: +/- 2 pi / 3 (minimal Z3 charge on the 3-cycle; the datum the chain propagates -> chirality, generations, mass)
